about_cta_desc: From ceremonial matcha to seasonal handcrafted drinks — everything is waiting for you.
about_hero_desc: UjCha — where matcha meets mindfulness, and every sip is a moment made just for you.
about_story_p1: UjCha was born from a passion for matcha and the philosophy of handcrafted drinks. We don't just sell beverages — we create small rituals that help you reconnect with yourself amid the rush of daily life.
about_story_p2: From ceremonial grade matcha stone-ground by hand in the traditional way, to carefully curated seasonal drinks — everything at UjCha carries the care and love of the people who make it.
about_story_p3: We aim to build a space — both physical and digital — where you can slow down, savour, and find your own quiet moment. Every cup of tea is a reminder: be present.
value_curated_body: We only select ceremonial grade matcha from reputable tea regions, alongside fresh ingredients that are rigorously vetted.
value_handcraft_body: Every cup of matcha is stone-ground by hand using the traditional method, preserving the fullest flavour and natural nutrients.
value_handcraft_headline: Made by hand, given with heart
value_mindful_body: UjCha is built to remind you to slow down — to find stillness in a cup of tea in the middle of a busy day.
blog_desc: Brewing guides, brand stories and the latest news from UjCha.
check_back_later: Check back later for new content.

terms_intro: These Terms govern the relationship between UjCha and its users when using the beverage ordering app, loyalty programme, and related UjCha services.
privacy_intro: At UjCha, we value your privacy. This Policy clearly explains what information is collected, how it is used, and how we protect your personal data when you use the UjCha app and services.
error_password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
error_name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters
ts1_body: By creating an account or using any UjCha service, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
ts2_p1_body: To place orders and earn loyalty points, you need to create an account with a valid Vietnamese phone number. One phone number may only be linked to one account. You must provide accurate information and update it when changes occur.
ts2_p2_body: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for all activity that occurs under your account. Notify UjCha immediately if you discover any unauthorised access.
ts2_p3_body: The service is intended for users aged 16 and over. Users under 18 require the consent of a parent or legal guardian.
ts3_p1_body: An order is considered confirmed when you receive a confirmation notification from the system. UjCha reserves the right to cancel an order if a product is out of stock or if fraudulent information is detected.
ts3_p2_body: Prices shown in the app include VAT (where applicable). UjCha accepts cash, bank transfer, and other payment methods listed in the app. Prices may change without prior notice.
ts3_p3_body: Vouchers are only valid under the conditions stated and cannot be exchanged for cash. Each voucher may only be used once unless otherwise specified. UjCha reserves the right to revoke vouchers if fraudulent use is detected.
ts4_p1_body: You may cancel an order within 5 minutes of placing it, provided the store has not yet confirmed it. Once the store confirms the order, it cannot be cancelled.
ts4_p2_body: If an order is cancelled due to an error on UjCha's part (out of stock, system error), we will issue a full refund via the same payment method within 3–7 business days.
ts4_p3_body: If the product received does not match its description or is of poor quality, please contact us within 1 hour of receiving the order and attach photos. We will review the complaint and provide a refund or compensation where the claim is valid.
ts5_p1_body: Points are credited automatically when an order is completed, at the current earning rate. Points are not awarded for cancelled or refunded orders.
ts5_p2_body: Accumulated points can only be redeemed for discount vouchers on the Rewards page. Points have no cash value and cannot be transferred between accounts.
ts5_p3_body: Points do not expire as long as the account remains active. If an account has no transactions for 24 consecutive months, points may be forfeited with 30 days' notice.
ts6_body: Users must not: (1) Create multiple accounts to abuse promotions; (2) Use automated tools to place orders or earn points; (3) Share an account with others to exploit offers; (4) Provide false information; (5) Engage in any fraudulent behaviour that affects the system or other users. Violations may result in permanent account suspension and forfeiture of all accumulated points.
ts7_body: UjCha provides the service on an as-is basis and does not guarantee uninterrupted service. To the fullest extent permitted by law, UjCha is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the service.
ts8_body: UjCha may update these Terms at any time. Changes take effect immediately upon publication. We will notify users via the app or email for significant changes. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
ts9_body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam. All disputes shall be resolved in the competent court at the locality where UjCha is headquartered.
ts10_body: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact UjCha support via the app or visit our store directly. We are happy to assist during business hours.
ps1_b1_body: When registering an account, you provide your name, phone number, and password. When placing an order, we record your delivery address and payment method. This information is required to complete a transaction.
ps1_b2_body: When you use the app, we automatically collect device data (device type, operating system), IP address, in-app browsing history, and shopping habits to improve your experience.
ps1_b3_body: Order history, accumulated points, vouchers used, and all financial activity on the UjCha platform are stored to support customer service and the loyalty programme.
ps2_b1_body: Personal information is used to process, confirm, and deliver orders to the correct address; to notify you of order status via SMS/push notifications; and to resolve transaction-related complaints.
ps2_b2_body: Transaction data is used to calculate reward points, assign membership tiers, and send personalised offers tailored to your shopping habits.
ps2_b3_body: We analyse aggregated (anonymised) data to develop new products, optimise the app experience, and adjust the menu based on actual demand.
ps2_b4_body: We may send order notifications, policy updates, and — if you agree — marketing offers via SMS or email. You can unsubscribe from marketing communications at any time.
ps3_b1_body: UjCha commits to never selling, renting, or trading your personal information with third parties for commercial purposes.
ps3_b2_body: We share the minimum necessary information with payment partners (bank payment gateways), delivery partners, and SMS service providers to carry out transactions. These partners are bound by strict confidentiality agreements.
ps3_b3_body: We may disclose information when required by a competent state authority under Vietnamese law.
ps4_b1_body: All data is transmitted over TLS-encrypted HTTPS connections. Passwords are hashed using the bcrypt algorithm and are never stored in plain text. Sensitive payment information is not stored directly on UjCha's systems.
ps4_b2_body: Only authorised personnel may access customer data within the scope of their role. All access is logged and reviewed periodically.
ps5_b1_body: You may view and edit your personal information at any time in the Profile section of the app.
ps5_b2_body: You may request deletion of your account and all personal data by contacting our support team. We will process the request within 30 business days, except for data we are legally required to retain.
ps5_b3_body: You can unsubscribe from marketing communications at any time via Settings → Notifications, or by contacting us directly.
ps6_b1_body: Retained for the lifetime of the account and deleted 90 days after the account is closed (except transaction data required under accounting law).
ps6_b2_body: Under Vietnamese law, financial transaction data is retained for a minimum of 5 years.
ps7_b1_body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact us via our support email or visit a UjCha store in person. We are committed to responding within 3 business days.
